IsAbbInvoice.desc: Indicates whether the invoice is an abbreviated/simplified invoice format (used for quick billing or compliance scenarios).

VoucherDate.desc: The date of the invoice. Determines accounting period and affects financial reporting.

ManualVoucherNO.desc: User-defined invoice number. If empty, system may auto-generate. Should be unique.

VoucherName.desc: Unique identifier of the invoice. If provided → update; if not → create new.

RefNo.desc: Reference number (e.g., coupon no, external system reference, order ID). Used for tracking.

Narration.desc: Additional description or remarks for the invoice. Appears in reports and print formats.

PartyLedgerCode.desc: Customer ledger ID. Represents the debtor account in accounting (Accounts Receivable).

TotalAmount.desc: Total invoice amount. Must match sum of all item amounts (after discount).

ProductName.desc: Unique identifier of the product/item being sold. Must exist in product master.

LedgerId.desc: Sales ledger/account where revenue will be posted (e.g., Sales Account).

UnitId.desc: Unit of measurement (e.g., PCS, KG). Must match product configuration.

ActualQty.desc: Actual quantity of goods. Used for stock tracking.

BilledQty.desc: Quantity billed to customer. May differ from actual (e.g., partial billing).

FreeQty.desc: Free quantity given (e.g., promotional items). Does not affect billing amount.

Rate.desc: Price per unit of the product.

DiscountPer.desc: Discount percentage applied on item level.

DiscountAmt.desc: Discount amount applied on item level.

Amount.desc: Final line amount after applying quantity, rate, and discount.

Address.desc: Customer address for billing and legal compliance.

SalesTaxNo.desc: Customer VAT/PAN number. Required for tax compliance.

Goods.desc: Additional logistics info (e.g., vehicle number, delivery details).

Name.desc: The official name of the debtor route. Typically represents a geographic area, locality, or route (e.g., Baneshwor, Lalitpur). Used for identifying and grouping customers.

Alias.desc: An alternate or short name for the route. Useful for internal reference, quick search, or display in UI where shorter names are preferred.

Code.desc: A unique code assigned to the route. Used as an identifier for system integration, reporting, and quick lookup. Should be unique across all routes.

Name.desc: The official name of the debtor type (e.g., Wholesaler, Retailer). Used for classification and reporting.

Alias.desc: An alternate or short name for the debtor type. Useful for internal reference, grouping, or UI display.

Code.desc: A unique identifier for the debtor type. Used in system integration, reporting, and quick lookup.

DType.desc:
Defines the category of debtor based on business classification. Allowed values:
1 = Dealer / Distributor (used for wholesale or distribution partners)
2 = Outlet (used for retail shops or end-point sellers)
3 = Branch (used for internal company branches or offices)
4 = Other (used for miscellaneous or uncategorized entities)
5 = Members (used for member-based customers, loyalty users, or special groups).

Name.desc: Full name of the agent/salesperson. Used for identification, reporting, and operational tracking.

Address.desc: Residential or operational address of the agent. Useful for regional assignment and communication.

Mobile.desc: Contact number of the agent. Used for communication, login verification, and notifications.

Code.desc: Unique identifier for the agent. Used in system mapping, reporting, and integration.

Level.desc: Defines the organizational hierarchy or role of the agent within the sales structure. Allowed values: 1 = Dealer Incharge (handles dealer-level operations) 2 = Sales Officer (executes field sales activities) 3 = ASM (Area Sales Manager) (manages a region/team) 4 = RSM (Regional Sales Manager) (oversees multiple areas) 5 = NSM (National Sales Manager) (manages national-level sales) 6 = Sales Director (strategic sales leadership) 7 = Managing Director (top-level executive authority).

Designation.desc: Official job title of the agent (e.g., Sales Officer, ASM). Used for display and organizational clarity.

Name.desc: Official name of the ledger/account (e.g., customer, supplier, bank). Used in all financial transactions and reports.

Alias.desc: Alternate or short name for the ledger. Useful for quick search and internal reference.

Code.desc: Unique identifier for the ledger. Used for system mapping, integrations, and reporting.

LedgerGroupId.desc: (Group) ID defining the classification of the ledger (e.g., Assets, Liabilities, Debtors). LedgerGroupId = 12 (Sundry Debtors), LedgerGroupId = 26 (Sundry Creditors)

Address.desc: Full address of the ledger entity. Required for billing, compliance, and reporting.

IsImportExportLedger.desc: Indicates whether the ledger is used for import/export transactions. Affects compliance and reporting rules.

DrCr.desc: Defines the default balance nature of the ledger. 1 = Debit (Dr) 2 = Credit (Cr)

CurrencyName.desc: Currency associated with the ledger (e.g., INR, NPR, USD). Used for multi-currency transactions.

Status.desc: Indicates whether the ledger is active. true = Active false = Inactive

StatutoryDetail.PanVatNo.desc: PAN/VAT/Tax identification number of the ledger. Required for statutory compliance and tax reporting.

File1.desc: Supporting document (e.g., agreement, KYC, contract). Stored against the ledger for verification and compliance.

VoucherDate.desc: The date of the journal entry. Determines the accounting period and affects financial reporting.

ManualVoucherNO.desc: User-defined journal number. If not provided, system may auto-generate. Should be unique.

VoucherName.desc: Unique identifier of the journal entry. If provided → update; if not → create new entry.

RefNo.desc: Reference number (e.g., invoice number, external document). Used for traceability.

Narration.desc: Description of the journal entry explaining the purpose of the transaction. Appears in reports.

DRCR.desc: Indicates whether the line is Debit or Credit. 1 = Debit (Dr) 2 = Credit (Cr)

LedgerId.desc: Ledger/account ID where the transaction is posted. Must exist in Chart of Accounts.

DrAmount.desc: Debit amount for the ledger line. Should be greater than 0 only if DRCR = 1.

CrAmount.desc: Credit amount for the ledger line. Should be greater than 0 only if DRCR = 2.

File1.desc: Supporting document (e.g., bill, receipt, expense proof). Stored for audit and compliance purposes.

VoucherName.desc: Type of voucher. Here it is “Receipt”, used to identify transaction type.

CostClassName.desc: Cost classification (e.g., Primary). Used for cost allocation and reporting.

AutoVoucherNo.desc: System-generated voucher number for internal tracking.

CurRate.desc: Currency exchange rate. Default = 1 for base currency.

Narration.desc: Line-level narration for the specific ledger entry.

VoucherDate.desc: Transaction date affecting accounting and reporting period.

EntryDate.desc: Date when the entry is recorded in the system.

LedgerName.desc: Name of the ledger (e.g., Cash, Bank, Customer).

LFNO.desc: Ledger Folio Number (optional reference for accounting tracking).

CostCenterName.desc: Name of the cost center (e.g., department, expense head).

CrAmount / DrAmount.desc: Allocated amount for the cost center.

ItemDetailsCOll.desc: Used when receipt involves item-level adjustments (rare in receipt).

TDSVatDetailColl.desc: Tax-related details (TDS/VAT). Used for statutory compliance.

CheckDetails.desc: Cheque/payment instrument details (e.g., cheque no, bank name).

BillRefColl.desc: Used to adjust receipt against outstanding invoices (important for AR).

File1.desc: Supporting document (receipt scan, payment proof, etc.). Used for audit and compliance.

Name.desc: Name of the product category (e.g., Snacks, Beverages). Used to classify products for reporting and organization.

Alias.desc: Alternate or short name for the category. Useful for internal reference or UI display.

Code.desc: Unique identifier for the product category. Used for system mapping, integrations, and quick lookup.

ParentCategoryId.desc: Reference to the parent product category. Enables hierarchical structure (main category → subcategory).

Name.desc: Official name of the product company or brand manufacturer. Used for identifying the company in product records and reports.

Code.desc: Unique identifier assigned to the product company. Used for system mapping, integrations, and quick lookup.

Address.desc: Physical or registered address of the company. Used for communication and documentation purposes.

ContactPerson.desc: Name of the primary contact person representing the company.

PhoneNo.desc: Contact number of the company or contact person. Used for communication and coordination.

Email.desc: Email address of the company or contact person. Used for official communication.

Website.desc: Official website URL of the company. Used for reference and external access to company information.

Name.desc: Name of the product group used to classify products at a higher level (e.g., FMCG, Electronics).

Alias.desc: Alternate or short name for the product group, used for internal reference or display purposes.

Code.desc: Unique identifier for the product group, used for system mapping and quick lookup.

ParentGroupId.desc: Reference to the parent product group, enabling hierarchical grouping (main group → sub-group). Represents nested product group structure.

Name.desc: Full name of the unit (e.g., "Cartoon", "Kilogram", "Liter", "Piece") — shown in invoices, stock reports, and item masters. Should be unique.

Alias.desc: Short name or symbol (e.g., "Ctn", "Kg", "Ltr", "Nos") — used for quick entry and display next to quantities. Optional.

NoOfDecimalPlaces.desc: Number of decimal places allowed for quantity (e.g., 0 for pieces, 2–3 for kg/liters). Controls input precision.

RateNoOfDecimalPlaces.desc: Number of decimal places allowed for rate/price per unit (usually 2–4). Helps with precise pricing of weight/volume items.

AmountNoOfDecimalPlaces.desc: Number of decimal places for total amount (Qty × Rate). Usually 2 (matches currency like INR).

TypeOfUnit.desc: Type/category of unit: • 1 = Quantity (default) – pieces, boxes, dozens • 2 = Weight – kg, gram, ton • 3 = Volume – liter, ml, cubic meter Affects default precision suggestions and reporting.

Name.desc: Name of the product. Used for identification, billing, and reporting.

Alias.desc: Alternate or short name for the product. Useful for quick search and display.

Code.desc: Unique identifier for the product. Used for system mapping and integration.

BaseUnitId.desc: Base unit of measurement for the product (e.g., PCS, KG). Used for stock and transactions.

ProductGroupId.desc: Reference to the product group under which the product is categorized.

GodownId.desc: Identifier of the warehouse/godown where opening stock is maintained.

Quantity.desc: Opening quantity of the product available in the specified godown.

UnitId.desc: Unit of measurement for the opening quantity.

Rate.desc: Selling price of the product used in sales transactions.

Amount.desc: Total value of opening stock (Quantity × Rate).

ApplicableFrom.desc: Date from which the selling price becomes effective.

File1.desc: Product image file used for display in UI, catalog, or reporting.

VoucherDate.desc: Date of the opening stock journal entry. Determines the accounting and inventory period.

ManualVoucherNO.desc: User-defined voucher number. If not provided, system may auto-generate.

VoucherName.desc: Type of voucher. Here it represents stock journal for opening inventory entries.

RefNo.desc: Reference number for the transaction (optional). Used for tracking and external references.

Narration.desc: Description or remarks for the opening stock entry.

ProductName.desc: Name of the product for which opening stock is recorded.

UnitName.desc: Unit of measurement for the product (e.g., PCS, KG).

Rate.desc: Cost rate per unit of the product.

ActualQty.desc: Actual physical quantity of stock available.

BilledQty.desc: Quantity considered for valuation and accounting purposes.

FreeQty.desc: Free quantity (if any) included in stock without cost impact.

DiscountPer.desc: Discount percentage applied on the item value.

DiscountAmt.desc: Discount amount applied on the item value.

Amount.desc: Total value of the stock item (based on quantity and rate after discount).

File1.desc: Supporting document (e.g., opening stock statement or audit file) attached for reference and compliance.

VoucherName.desc: Type of voucher. Represents Sales Order transaction.

AutoVoucherNo.desc: System-generated voucher number for internal tracking.

CurRate.desc: Currency exchange rate applicable to the transaction.

Narration.desc: General description or remarks for the sales order.

VoucherDate.desc: Date of the sales order transaction.

PartyLedgerName.desc: Name of the customer/party placing the order.

AgentName.desc: Name of the sales agent associated with the order.

UnitId.desc: Unit of measurement for the product.

Rate.desc: Rate applied for the additional cost.

VatRate.desc: VAT rate applied at batch level.

LedgerName.desc: Name of the ledger for additional charges (e.g., Freight, VAT).

AccessableValue.desc: Base value on which the charge is calculated.

CreditDays.desc: Number of credit days allowed for the customer.

SalesTaxNo.desc: Tax identification number of the customer.

File1.desc: Supporting document (e.g., order document or agreement) attached to the sales order.

VoucherDate.desc: Date of the sales invoice transaction. Determines accounting and reporting period.

ManualVoucherNO.desc: User-defined invoice number. If not provided, system may auto-generate.

RefNo.desc: Reference number (e.g., order number or external reference).

Narration.desc: Description or remarks for the invoice.

PartyLedgerCode.desc: Identifier of the customer/party ledger associated with the invoice.

TotalAmount.desc: Total invoice amount including items, taxes, and additional charges.

BranchCode.desc: Identifier of the branch where the transaction is recorded.

ProductName.desc: Identifier of the product being sold.

ItemAllocationId.desc: Unique identifier for the item allocation line (used for update/reference).

Rate.desc: Rate applied for the charge (e.g., VAT %).

Amount.desc: Total amount of the additional charge or tax.

UnitId.desc: Unit of measurement for the product.

DiscountPer.desc: Discount percentage applied to the product.

DiscountAmt.desc: Discount amount applied to the product.

LedgerId.desc: Identifier of the ledger for additional charges (e.g., VAT, Discount, Freight).

Naration.desc: Description of the additional charge (e.g., VAT, Discount).

File1.desc: Supporting document (e.g., tax invoice PDF) attached for reference and compliance.

VoucherName.desc: Type of voucher representing a sales return transaction.

RefNo.desc: Reference number linked to the original sales invoice or transaction.

CurrencyName.desc: Currency in which the transaction is recorded.

CurRate.desc: Exchange rate applicable to the currency.

Narration.desc: Remarks or description for the sales return.

VoucherDate.desc: Date of the sales return transaction.

PartyLedgerName.desc: Name of the customer/party returning the goods.

TotalAmt.desc: Total value of the sales return including items and additional charges.

ProductName.desc: Name of the product being returned.

ActualQty.desc: Actual quantity of the returned product.

UnitName.desc: Unit of measurement for the product.

Rate.desc: Rate applied for the charge or tax.

Amount.desc: Total amount of the charge or tax.

LedgerName.desc: Name of the ledger for additional charges (e.g., VAT, Excise Duty).

CreditDays.desc: Number of credit days applicable for the return transaction.

Buyes.desc: Name of the buyer/customer associated with the return.

SalesTaxNo.desc: Tax identification number of the customer.

TermsOfDelivery.desc: Delivery terms associated with the transaction.

Destination.desc: Destination location for the returned goods.

TermsOfPayment.desc: Payment terms related to the transaction.

OtherRefereces.desc: Additional references or remarks related to the return.

File1.desc: Supporting document (e.g., sales return invoice or proof) attached for reference and compliance.

VoucherName.desc: Unique identifier of the consumption voucher. Used for update/reference.

Narration.desc: Description or remarks for the consumption transaction.

PartyLedgerName.desc: Name of the related party ledger (if applicable).

PartyLedgerCode.desc: Identifier of the related party ledger (if applicable).

ProductName.desc: Identifier of the product being consumed.

CostCenterId.desc: Identifier of the cost center where the consumption is allocated.

UnitId.desc: Unit of measurement for the product.

Rate.desc: Cost rate per unit of the product.

Amount.desc: Total cost of consumed quantity (Quantity × Rate).

File1.desc: Supporting document (e.g., consumption report or internal record) attached for reference.

VoucherDate.desc: Date of the purchase invoice transaction.

VoucherName.desc: Name/type of the voucher representing purchase invoice.

RefNo.desc: Reference number for the purchase invoice (e.g., supplier invoice number).

TotalAmount.desc: Total amount of the purchase invoice including items and charges.

Narration.desc: Description or remarks for the purchase transaction.

PartyLedgerName.desc: Name of the supplier/vendor associated with the purchase.

Buyes.desc: Name or category of the supplier.

SalesTaxNo.desc: Tax identification number of the supplier.

CreditDays.desc: Number of credit days allowed by the supplier.

DueDate.desc: Due date for payment of the invoice.

TermsOfDelivery.desc: Delivery terms associated with the purchase.

TermsOfPayment.desc: Payment terms agreed with the supplier.

AdvancePayment.desc: Amount paid in advance for the purchase.

Notes.desc: Additional notes or remarks related to the purchase.

GodownName.desc: Name of the warehouse/godown where items are stored.

UnitName.desc: Unit of measurement for the product.

Amount.desc: Total amount for the item (Quantity × Rate after discount).

File1.desc: Supporting document (e.g., purchase bill or invoice) attached for reference and record keeping.

LedgerId.desc: Identifier of the ledger (e.g., customer, distributor, or branch) for which projection is defined.

YearId.desc: Fiscal year identifier for the projection (e.g., Nepali fiscal year).

MonthId.desc: Month identifier within the fiscal year (e.g., 1–12).

ProductName.desc: Identifier of the product for which projection quantity is defined.

ProjectionQty.desc: Projected quantity of the product for the specified ledger, year, and month.

VoucherDate.desc: Date of the salesman visit to the outlet.

LedgerId.desc: Identifier of the outlet/customer ledger visited by the salesman.

Remarks.desc: Remarks or reason for no order during the visit.

VisitStatus.desc: Status of the visit (e.g., completed, not available, no order placed).

Lat.desc: Latitude coordinate of the visit location.

Lng.desc: Longitude coordinate of the visit location.

NerestLocation.desc: Nearest known location or landmark of the visit.

NextScheduleDateTime.desc: Next scheduled visit date and time for the outlet.

File1.desc: Image or proof of visit (e.g., outlet photo) attached for tracking and verification.

DateFrom.desc: Start date of the expense claim period.

DateTo.desc: End date of the expense claim period.

ExpenseTitle.desc: Title or summary of the expense claim.

ExpenseTypeId.desc: Identifier representing the type of expense (e.g., travel, food, lodging).

PurposeOfVisit.desc: Purpose of the visit or activity for which the expense is claimed.

ExpenseDate.desc: Date on which the expense was incurred.

Quantity.desc: Quantity related to the expense (e.g., number of items, trips).

Rate.desc: Cost per unit of the expense.

Description.desc: Description or remarks for the specific expense item.

File1.desc: Supporting document (e.g., expense bill or receipt image) attached for verification and record.
